===
Ternary If Precedence Abuse
===
procedure Test;
begin
  Result := A + if B then C else D * E;
  (if A then ObjA else ObjB).DoSomething;
  if A then if B then C else D else E;
end;
---

(root
  (defProc
    (declProc
      (kProcedure)
      (identifier))
    (block
      (kBegin)
      (assignment
        (identifier)
        (kAssign)
        (exprBinary
          (identifier)
          (kAdd)
          (exprIf
            (kIf)
            (identifier)
            (kThen)
            (identifier)
            (kElse)
            (exprBinary
              (identifier)
              (kMul)
              (identifier)))))
      (statement
        (exprDot
          (exprParens
            (exprIf
              (kIf)
              (identifier)
              (kThen)
              (identifier)
              (kElse)
              (identifier)))
          (kDot)
          (identifier)))
      (ifElse
        (kIf)
        (identifier)
        (kThen)
        (ifElse
          (kIf)
          (identifier)
          (kThen)
          (statement
            (identifier))
          (kElse)
          (statement
            (identifier)))
        (kElse)
        (statement
          (identifier)))
      (kEnd))))

===
Logical Operators Chaining and Precedence
===
procedure Test2;
begin
  if A is not B and C not in D then;
  if A + B not in C * D then;
end;
---

(root
  (defProc
    (declProc
      (kProcedure)
      (identifier))
    (block
      (kBegin)
      (if
        (kIf)
        (exprBinary
          (exprBinary
            (identifier)
            (kIsNot)
            (exprBinary
              (identifier)
              (kAnd)
              (identifier)))
          (kNotIn)
          (identifier))
        (kThen))
      (if
        (kIf)
        (exprBinary
          (exprBinary
            (identifier)
            (kAdd)
            (identifier))
          (kNotIn)
          (exprBinary
            (identifier)
            (kMul)
            (identifier)))
        (kThen))
      (kEnd))))

===
Custom Managed Records Complex
===
type
  TMyRecord = record
  strict private
    class operator Initialize(out Dest: MyNamespace.TMyRecord);
  public
    Field: Integer;
    class operator Finalize(var Dest: MyNamespace.TMyRecord);
  end;
---

(root
  (declTypes
    (kType)
    (declType
      (identifier)
      (kEq)
      (declClass
        (kRecord)
        (declSection
          (kStrict)
          (kPrivate)
          (declProc
            (kClass)
            (kOperator)
            (identifier)
            (declArgs
              (declArg
                (kOut)
                (identifier)
                (type
                  (typeref
                    (typerefDot
                      (identifier)
                      (kDot)
                      (identifier))))))))
        (declSection
          (kPublic)
          (declField
            (identifier)
            (type
              (typeref
                (identifier))))
          (declProc
            (kClass)
            (kOperator)
            (identifier)
            (declArgs
              (declArg
                (kVar)
                (identifier)
                (type
                  (typeref
                    (typerefDot
                      (identifier)
                      (kDot)
                      (identifier))))))))
        (kEnd)))))

===
Case Otherwise Diabolical Nested
===
procedure Test5;
begin
  case X of
    1: case Y of
         2: DoTwo;
         otherwise DoOtherTwo;
       end;
    otherwise
      DoOtherX1;
      DoOtherX2;
  end;
end;
---

(root
  (defProc
    (declProc
      (kProcedure)
      (identifier))
    (block
      (kBegin)
      (case
        (kCase)
        (identifier)
        (kOf)
        (caseCase
          (caseLabel
            (literalNumber))
          (case
            (kCase)
            (identifier)
            (kOf)
            (caseCase
              (caseLabel
                (literalNumber))
              (statement
                (identifier)))
            (kOtherwise)
            (statement
              (identifier))
            (kEnd)))
        (kOtherwise)
        (statement
          (identifier))
        (statement
          (identifier))
        (kEnd))
      (kEnd))))

    for var subItem in item do
